lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Ramon! Move! The sheep are acting strange!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: ...They're sheeps, they are always strange.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Wait... You can talk?!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: It's a long story but we need to get out of here! Follow me!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Give me a second I just woke up from my nap I don't even know my name yet.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Come on Ramon! Use the arrow keys or A/D to move. Press Space to jump!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Jump, Ramon! They say the devil will eat you if you fall in those pits!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: I'm not scared of a few holes in the ground. But I don't want to stain my new robe either.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Ramon, look out! That sheep has glowing red eyes!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Possessed livestock. Just my luck.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Looks like it cannot move, try hitting it! Quickly Press Z to attack!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: There are so many!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Keep your distance and try a long shot with your sling! Press Z to charge and release to shoot a stone!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Wha.. What happened? The floor collapsed!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Sa Cova des Bous... this is a place of magic. The best warriors of the island train here. I hope we don't come accross any of them.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: It's dark in there! I'll stay close.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: He's blocking the jump! Try hitting him from a distance!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Hold Z to charge your sling for a long shot!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: They look strong, they might take a few hits to go down!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: If they keep resisting so many shorts we'll never make it in time for snack...

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Maybe if you hold the sling longer... try holding Z until it glows bright!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Looks a bit tight for you Ramon...

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: What do you mean tight... for me?

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Well it's not news that you've let yourself go since you stopped working as a shepherd.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Try pressing down to crouch and fit through that gap! You can still move side to side while crouching!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: We need to go UP! Try jumping off the walls!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Es Talayot Sagrat... my people built these. Never thought I'd climb one from the inside.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: That one's big! Watch out for its swing!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Stone guardians hit hard but they're slow. Watch for the wind-up!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: The ground here looks crumbly... but nothing happens when we jump on it.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Needs more force than my feet. We'll come back.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Something feels wrong here... the ground is shaking.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Sa Porta des Bou. The gate of the bull. Stay close.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: There's a lot of supplies here. Stock up before we go further.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Someone left these here for a reason. Probably a warning.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: The pillars... they're carved with bulls! And the ground won't stop shaking!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Es Bou de Pedra is beyond that gate. Ready your stones.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Bon dia, Ramon! Welcome to the test level.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Another cursed place. Let's get this over with.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Press Enter to advance dialogue. Use Arrow Keys to move!
